A monumental collaboration of purpose, power, and high couture. ️✨ We are thrilled to reveal the sensational runway icons leading the highly anticipated Florian Foundation (By Archana Jain) x Mumbai Halchal (By Dilshad Khan) presentation, featuring the exquisite curation of Sanam’s, at Ahmedabad Fashion Week Season 3.0. This extraordinary showcase stands as a movement of uncompromised creativity, culture, and design leadership. Show Stopper: The breathtaking Shivani Sharma brings her unparalleled grace, bold aura, and pure runway brilliance to redefine luxury couture. Prepared under world-class production and curation by the BRDS team, this avant-garde fashion experience is something you simply cannot afford to miss.
